form.formComment: First starter by Revolutionary out of Changiparang. Has the right profile for a good debut.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Revolutionary out of Changiparang. Has the right profile for a good debut.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 62-day let-up. Most recently second last of 11 at this track on February 8 over 1200m, 22 len behind Raon The Pluma with 54kg at $45.60. The run before that 8th of 10 at this track on December 28 over 1300m, slow going 16 len behind Pas De Cheval with 54kg at $26. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Comes here off a 62-day let-up. Most recently second last of 11 at this track on February 8 over 1200m, 22 len behind Raon The Pluma with 54kg at $45.60. The run before that 8th of 10 at this track on December 28 over 1300m, slow going 16 len behind Pas De Cheval with 54kg at $26. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 4th of 11 at this track on February 28 over 1200m, 7 len behind Ever Glory with 56kg at $4.70. Will have benefited from that outing and is likely to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was well in the market at debut, 4th of 11 at this track on February 28 over 1200m, 7 len behind Ever Glory with 56kg at $4.70. Will have benefited from that outing and is likely to measure up.

form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, 5th of 11 at this track on March 7 over 1200m, 7 len behind Flying Honor carrying 54kg at $40.10. Encouraging signs on debut and is worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Was at long odds at debut, 5th of 11 at this track on March 7 over 1200m, 7 len behind Flying Honor carrying 54kg at $40.10. Encouraging signs on debut and is worth following up.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, 7th of 9 at this track on January 3 over 1200m, slow going 27 len behind Surprise with 56.5kg at $27. Second-up raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 11 at this track on March 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Aesuni with 56kg at $58.20. This race is well within his grasp.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, 7th of 9 at this track on January 3 over 1200m, slow going 27 len behind Surprise with 56.5kg at $27. Second-up raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 11 at this track on March 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Aesuni with 56kg at $58.20. This race is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a 12 weeks break. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at this track January 18 over 1200m, 62 len behind Yukwaehan Seungja with 56.5kg at $80.20. On debut ran last of 11 at this track December 27 over 1200m, soft track; 24 len behind Unju Clear carrying 56kg at $80.20. Not at this stage.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). He is resuming after a 12 weeks break. form.formComment: First starter by Musket Man out of Now I Know. On profile she seems hard pressed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Musket Man out of Now I Know. On profile she seems hard pressed.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start second last of 11 at this track on December 27 over 1200m, slow going 17 len behind Unju Clear with 54kg at $58.10. Went for a spell before returning 8th of 11 at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 13 len behind Clover One carrying 54.5kg at $55.30. Needs to do a lot more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Third race start. First start second last of 11 at this track on December 27 over 1200m, slow going 17 len behind Unju Clear with 54kg at $58.10. Went for a spell before returning 8th of 11 at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 13 len behind Clover One carrying 54.5kg at $55.30. Needs to do a lot more.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, settled back and ran on when 5th of 10 at this track on March 2 over 1200m, 22 len behind Weak Play carrying 51kg at $30.30. Will have benefited from that outing and is likely to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Jumped at big odds at debut, settled back and ran on when 5th of 10 at this track on March 2 over 1200m, 22 len behind Weak Play carrying 51kg at $30.30. Will have benefited from that outing and is likely to measure up.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at this track January 3 over 1200m, soft track; 13 len behind B.K. Devil with 55kg at $5.70. On debut second of 10 at this track November 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Geosen Dolgyeok with 55kg at $6. Could prove too smart for these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at this track January 3 over 1200m, soft track; 13 len behind B.K. Devil with 55kg at $5.70. On debut second of 10 at this track November 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Geosen Dolgyeok with 55kg at $6. Could prove too smart for these.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 11 at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 11 len behind Clover One with 54.5kg at $39.90. Before that got back early 8th of 10 at this track on March 2 over 1200m, 25 len behind Weak Play with 54kg at $20.80. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.
